description_long: This is a crumpled Coca-Cola can, featuring a bright red aluminum body with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed. The can is visibly deformed, with several dents and irregularities along its cylindrical surface, suggesting it has been crushed or compressed. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening, and the bottom is slightly concave as is typical for beverage cans. Nutritional information, barcodes, and recycling symbols are visible on the back and side panels. The surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the can appears empty as there is no visible liquid inside. The overall appearance is that of a discarded or post-consumption soda can commonly found in urban environments.
description: A crumpled, glossy red Coca-Cola can with visible dents, white branding, and a silver pull-tab top. The can is empty and shows signs of deformation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo in white script on a red, dented can body.
description_view_1: Side view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and recycling symbols on the deformed can.
description_view_2: Rear view with more nutritional details and visible dents, less branding visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the 'Coca' part of the logo and pronounced deformation on the lower side.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo on red background, nutritional information, barcode, recycling symbols, and QR code in white on the back and side panels.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Multiple visible dents and deformations along the can body, especially on the lower and side surfaces.
